tutorial.first_build: Tap a building slot to construct your first building.
tutorial.draw_cards: Draw cards at the start of each turn.
tutorial.play_card: Tap a card, then tap a target to play it.
tutorial.energy: Cards cost energy. You regenerate {0} per turn.
tutorial.hero_summon: You've earned enough shards! Summon your new hero.
hero.lyra_thornveil.name: Lyra Thornveil
hero.lyra_thornveil.desc: A nature mage who weaves vines and thorns to protect allies.
hero.kael_ashwalker.name: Kael Ashwalker
hero.kael_ashwalker.desc: A fire sorcerer who channels the fury of the Ashen Wastes.
hero.thane_ironhold.name: Thane Ironhold
hero.thane_ironhold.desc: An armored defender of the Iron Legion, unbreakable in battle.
hero.zara_voidweaver.name: Zara Voidweaver
hero.zara_voidweaver.desc: A void mystic who bends shadow to confuse and weaken foes.
hero.rowan_stoneward.name: Rowan Stoneward
hero.rowan_stoneward.desc: A steadfast guardian with the strength of living stone.
hero.mira_frostbane.name: Mira Frostbane
hero.mira_frostbane.desc: An ice mage whose frost slows all who oppose her.
hero.vex_shadowstrike.name: Vex Shadowstrike
hero.vex_shadowstrike.desc: A shadow assassin who strikes from the darkness.
hero.sera_dawnblade.name: Sera Dawnblade
hero.sera_dawnblade.desc: A holy knight radiating divine light to heal and smite.
hero.grim_bonecrusher.name: Grim Bonecrusher
hero.grim_bonecrusher.desc: A berserker who grows stronger as battle rages.
hero.nyx_stormcaller.name: Nyx Stormcaller
hero.nyx_stormcaller.desc: A lightning mage who chains destruction across the field.
building.stronghold.name: Stronghold
building.stronghold.desc: The heart of your empire. Upgrade to unlock new districts.
building.barracks.name: Barracks
building.barracks.desc: Train soldiers to bolster your military might.
building.training_ground.name: Training Ground
building.watch_tower.name: Watch Tower
building.watch_tower.desc: Provides early warning of incoming attacks.
building.wall.name: Wall
building.armory.name: Armory
building.armory.desc: Stores weapons and armor for your troops.
building.stone_quarry.name: Stone Quarry
building.iron_mine.name: Iron Mine
building.iron_mine.desc: Mines iron ore from deep underground.
building.grain_farm.name: Grain Farm
building.grain_farm.desc: Cultivates grain to feed your people.
building.arcane_tower.name: Arcane Tower
building.arcane_tower.desc: Harnesses magical essence from the ley lines.
building.marketplace.name: Marketplace
building.marketplace.desc: Trade goods to boost your economy.
building.academy.name: Academy
building.academy.desc: Research technologies to advance your empire.
building.library.name: Library
building.laboratory.name: Laboratory
building.observatory.name: Observatory
building.observatory.desc: Study the stars for strategic advantage.
building.archive.name: Archive
building.hero_shrine.name: Hero Shrine
building.hero_shrine.desc: Honor fallen heroes to gain their blessing.
building.guild_hall.name: Guild Hall
building.guild_hall.desc: Coordinate with allies for joint operations.
building.enchanting_tower.name: Enchanting Tower
building.forge.name: Forge
building.forge.desc: Craft weapons and armor from raw materials.
building.embassy.name: Embassy
building.embassy.desc: Establish diplomatic ties with other alliances.
quest.daily.alliance_chat: Send a message in alliance chat
error.network: Network error. Please check your connection.
error.server: Server error. Please try again later.
error.session_expired: Session expired. Please log in again.
notif.come_back: Your troops miss you! Come back and claim resources.
event.void_rift.desc: Dark portals have opened across the land. Defeat the void creatures!
event.world_boss.desc: A mighty beast threatens the realm. Rally your alliance!
event.alliance_tournament.desc: Compete against other alliances for glory and rewards!
event.launch_celebration.desc: Celebrate the launch of Ashen Throne with bonus rewards!
